andy-biggs.notes_set: Sitting AZ-05 U.S. Representative running for 2026 AZ Governor (R primary 2026-07-21). Trump-endorsed Apr 2025 (sole pick after Karrin Taylor Robson withdrew Feb 2026). March 2026 polling: Biggs 40%, Schweikert 19%. House seat is open for 2026. Heritage Action lifetime ~93–95%; current 119th Congress score 96%. Cofounder bipartisan War Powers Caucus; introduced WHO Withdrawal Act + Birthright Citizenship Act cosponsor + Life at Conception Act cosponsor + CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act cosponsor + Balanced Budget Amendment H.J.Res.139. AIPAC-PAC career total $39,184 per TrackAIPAC (already reflected as foreign_policy_restraint q3 FALSE + america_first adjustment). Notable deviation: voted NO on federal Parents Bill of Rights (2023) on federalism grounds.

0.note: Cosponsor Life at Conception Act (H.R.722, 119th; H.R.431, 118th) — defines person from fertilization.

1.note: Authored Abortion Is Not Health Care Act; voted to defund Planned Parenthood via H.R.1 reconciliation.

2.note: Personhood-bill cosponsor; but the bill contains explicit IVF carve-out language and Biggs declined to comment on IVF when pressed — no documented opposition to IVF embryo discard.

3.note: No documented federal vote or public statement on euthanasia / PAS.

4.note: OpenSecrets donor profile shows no Planned Parenthood / NARAL / EMILY's List PAC contributions; SBA Pro-Life endorsed.

mark-lamb.notes_set: Pinal County Sheriff 2017–2024; Trump-endorsed 2025-11-04 for AZ-05 R primary (Biggs's open seat); House Freedom Fund + Club for Growth endorsed. NO congressional voting record — scored from 2024 Senate-campaign issues page, 8-yr Sheriff record (anti-SB1625 red-flag, COVID-mandate refusal, drop-box surveillance), and current AZ-05 campaign. DEVIATION: TrackAIPAC records $2,000 from AMP pro-Israel PAC — fails the foreign-policy q3 'never took' standard. SECONDARY FLAG: May–Jun 2026 reporting on alleged sexual misconduct / threats / racist messages prompted Schweikert call to withdraw; Trump weighing endorsement pullback. Still on ballot 2026-06-04. AZ statutory primary is Aug 4, 2026 per AZ SOS; Ballotpedia/Club for Growth pages list July 21 — verify final date.

travis-grantham.notes_set: WITHDREW 2026-03-13 from AZ-05 R primary — called to active-duty Air Force service; did not file nominating signatures. Direct quote: 'I am not going to be filing my signatures to run for Congress. As many of you have been speculating, I have been called into active-duty service for the Air Force.' Identity confirmed as former AZ House Speaker Pro Tempore (2021–2025) and current Lt Col / KC-135 pilot in the AZ Air National Guard. Scoring drawn from his 8-year AZ State House record: voted YES on HB2853 universal ESA expansion (2022 party-line 31–26); YES on HB2492 proof-of-citizenship-to-vote (2022); YES on SB1456 parental-consent-on-SOGI-sex-ed (2021); sponsored HB2310 anti-grooming bill; voted NO on 2024 repeal of 1864 territorial abortion ban (defending existing pro-life statute). DEVIATIONS noted: NumbersUSA snippet indicates openness to guest-worker pathways for some illegal entrants (softens border q1); active-duty USAF + ARSA aerospace-PAC support are interventionist signals (Industry Capture q4 risk); no public church affiliation found — Christian Liberty q0 null.

mike-gross-az-05.notes_set: Heterodox R candidate on the 2026 AZ-05 R primary ballot (FEC ID H6AZ05273, filed 2026-01-06). Substack-driven campaign ('gross4az.substack.com'); ~25 Substack subscribers, no FEC money raised yet visible. Self-positions as 'Republican alternative to Trump-endorsed Mark Lamb' but published platform ('Promises for Us 2028: A New American Blueprint for the 99%') explicitly opposes Trump ('Narcissist-in-Chief') and calls for: codifying federal reproductive freedom, eliminating 'weapons intended solely for the military' (AWB), wealth tax on $50M+, government equity stakes in bailed-out companies, replacing border 'cruelty and aggression with compassion,' and 'healthcare is a human right.' MULTIPLE DEVIATIONS from the Christian-conservative rubric. Religion: NO EVIDENCE FOUND — no church affiliation or Christian self-identification on any platform.

daniel-keenan.notes_set: First-time R candidate on the 2026 AZ-05 R primary ballot (FEC ID H6AZ05182). Self-funded ($1.4M self-loan of $1.5M raised). MAGA-aligned, pledged to join House Freedom Caucus; positions himself as 'most effective pro-Trump' alternative (Trump endorsed Mark Lamb instead). 'Lifelong Christian' self-ID. Strongest evidenced positions: border (finish wall, end catch-and-release, mandatory E-Verify, end birthright for illegal immigrants), election integrity (Voter ID + citizenship, tighten mail-in, end ballot harvesting), anti-woke schools (real school choice, end indoctrination), 2A (oppose bans/registries/red-flag), oppose trans-drugs and surrogacy for single men / same-sex couples, pharma liability for prescribed drugs. Weak/silent on personhood (Hyde-style 'no taxpayer funding' not abolition), most economic-stewardship cells, Christian-liberty specifics, raw-milk / Big Ag, ATF / UN-treaty. DEVIATION: supported recent unilateral U.S. strikes on Iran without Article I framing while restraint-leaning on Ukraine.
